items.article_title_extracted: Core Automation
items.description: Core Automation focuses on innovative research in AI, moving away from traditional methods like scaling models and using reinforcement learning. They emphasize the importance of small teams utilizing capable AI agents to drive frontier research. Their approach involves automating their own workflows to enable more ambitious projects, leading to a more dynamic and creative environment. The vision posits that small teams, equipped with advanced AI systems, can perform tasks previously reserved for larger organizations, fostering broader access to ambitious work opportunities. The team is composed of experts in cutting-edge AI technologies and aims to redesign neural network architectures in a compact lab setting. They invite interested individuals to join their initiative.
items.description_zh: Core Automation 专注于人工智能领域的创新研究，摒弃了传统的大规模模型扩展和强化学习方法。他们强调小团队利用高效AI智能体推动前沿研究的重要性，通过自动化自身工作流程来实现更具雄心的项目，从而营造更具活力与创造力的环境。其愿景认为，配备先进AI系统的小团队能够完成以往只有大型组织才能承担的任务，为更多人创造参与高挑战性工作的机会。该团队由尖端AI技术专家组成，致力于在紧凑的实验室环境中重新设计神经网络架构，并诚邀有志之士加入这一创新计划。
items.title: Core Automation
items.title_zh: 核心自动化

items.article_text: Grok API Company Colossus Careers News Shop SpaceX 𝕏 Try Grok May 15, 2026 Connect Grok to Hermes Agent Use your Grok account and subscription inside Nous Research’s open-source, self-improving Hermes agent. Starting today, you can use your Grok subscription directly inside Hermes Agent. Hermes Agent is Nous Research’s open-source, self-improving agent. It runs persistently on any computer, sandbox, or VPS and creates long-term memory across sessions, learning as you use it. Like other open-source personal agents, Hermes can connect to WhatsApp, Discord, Telegram, Signal, or other messaging providers. With your Grok subscription in Hermes, you can use: Grok 4.3 for text conversations and advanced reasoning Grok Text-to-Speech for spoken responses Grok Imagine for your agent to create images and videos Connecting Grok to your Hermes agent is available on every tier. Setup Install Hermes Agent: bash # Linux / macOS / WSL2 / Android (Termux) curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.sh | bash Pick the Grok provider: bash hermes model Select xAI Grok OAuth (SuperGrok Subscription) , sign in through the browser, and start chatting: bash hermes --tui For more, see the Hermes Agent xAI Grok OAuth docs . More open-source agents and integrations are coming soon. Try Grok On Web iOS Android Grok on X Products Grok 𝕏 Grok Enterprise Grokipedia API Overview Voice API Imagine API Pricing API Console Login Documentation Company Company Careers Contact News Resources Privacy policy Privacy portal Security Safety Legal Status
items.article_text_zh:
2026年5月15日  
**将Grok接入Hermes Agent**  
使用你的Grok账户和订阅，在Nous Research的开源、自我进化智能体Hermes中运行。  

即日起，你可以直接在Hermes Agent中使用你的Grok订阅。Hermes Agent是Nous Research开发的开源、自我进化智能体。它可持久运行于任何计算机、沙箱或VPS上，跨会话创建长期记忆，并在使用过程中不断学习。与其他开源个人智能体一样，Hermes可连接WhatsApp、Discord、Telegram、Signal或其他消息服务提供商。  

在Hermes中使用你的Grok订阅后，你可以调用：  
- **Grok 4.3**：用于文本对话与高级推理  
- **Grok文本转语音**：生成语音回复  
- **Grok Imagine**：让智能体创建图像与视频  

所有订阅层级均支持将Grok接入你的Hermes智能体。  

**设置步骤**  
1. 安装Hermes Agent：  
   ```bash
   # Linux / macOS / WSL2 / Android (Termux)
   curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
   ```  
2. 选择Grok提供商：  
   ```bash
   hermes model
   ```  
3. 选择 **xAI Grok OAuth（SuperGrok订阅）**，通过浏览器登录，然后开始对话：  
   ```bash
   hermes --tui
   ```  

更多详情请参阅 [Hermes Agent xAI Grok OAuth文档](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.sh)。更多开源智能体与集成即将推出。  

**试用Grok**  
[网页版](https://x.ai) | [iOS](https://x.ai) | [Android](https://x.ai) | [Grok on X](https://x.ai)  

**产品**  
Grok | 𝕏 Grok Enterprise | Grokipedia | API概览 | Voice API | Imagine API | 定价 | API控制台 | 登录 | 文档  

**公司**  
公司 | 招聘 | 联系 | 新闻  

**资源**  
隐私政策 | 隐私门户 | 安全 | 安全合规 | 法律 | 状态

items.article_title_extracted: Sitegeist - Your AI Companion for the Web
items.description: Sitegeist is an AI assistant designed for browser integration, allowing users to automate web tasks and extract data efficiently. Key features include real-time data extraction for research, summarizing video content, grammar checks, and social media engagement automation. The tool prioritizes user privacy, storing data locally and providing control over personal information. Sitegeist can operate in various Chromium-based browsers and supports both cloud and local AI models. It is open source under the AGPL-3.0 license. Users can create custom automation skills specific to websites, maintain live documents, and manage system settings easily.
items.description_zh: Sitegeist 是一款专为浏览器集成设计的 AI 助手，帮助用户高效自动化网页任务并提取数据。其核心功能包括：实时数据提取（适用于研究场景）、视频内容摘要、语法检查以及社交媒体互动自动化。该工具优先保障用户隐私，数据本地存储且用户可自主控制个人信息。Sitegeist 支持各类 Chromium 内核浏览器，兼容云端与本地 AI 模型，采用 AGPL-3.0 开源协议。用户可针对特定网站创建自定义自动化技能，维护实时文档，并轻松管理系统设置。
items.title: Sitegeist - Your AI Companion for the Web
items.title_zh: Sitegeist - 你的网页AI伴侣

items.article_text:
Today we’re releasing a preview of a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT to Pro users in the U.S. Now you can securely connect your financial accounts, see a dashboard of where your money is going, and ask ChatGPT questions grounded in your financial context – all while staying in control of your data. We’re starting with a preview to a smaller group so we can learn from real-world use, improve the experience, and expand thoughtfully.
Money touches nearly every part of life: where we live, what decisions we make, how we care for loved ones, what future we imagine. But managing finances today often means piecing together accounts, apps, cards, loans, and spreadsheets just to know where things stand. Even then, it can be hard to see the full picture or know what to do next.
People are already turning to ChatGPT for help: more than 200 million people [come to ChatGPT(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/use-cases/money-and-finances) every month for budgeting, questions about their investments, comparing different paths, planning for future goals, and more. Recent advances in GPT‑5.5 make ChatGPT stronger at reasoning through the complex, context-dependent questions that personal finance often requires.
With your financial accounts connected, ChatGPT can combine that reasoning with your real financial context and what you’ve shared about your goals, lifestyle, and priorities, helping you spot patterns, understand tradeoffs, and plan for big decisions in a way that feels more personal and complete. Now you can ask questions like:
ChatGPT can help you stay informed and feel more confident managing your finances, but it is not a replacement for professional financial advice.
Starting today, we’re rolling out the ability for Pro users in the U.S. to connect their financial accounts in ChatGPT on web and iOS, with support for more than 12,000 financial institutions. We’ll learn and improve from early use before rolling it out to Plus, with the goal of making it available to everyone.
Connect your financial information
To get started, open Finances from the sidebar in ChatGPT and select ‘Get started’ or start a conversation from anywhere in ChatGPT by saying ‘@Finances, connect my accounts’.
ChatGPT will then guide you through securely linking accounts through Plaid, with Intuit support coming soon. After you authenticate, ChatGPT will begin syncing and categorizing your data, which may take a few minutes.
Once your accounts are synced, you can see a dashboard that gives you an up-to-date view of where you stand across portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, upcoming payments, and more.
Beyond connected accounts, you can share important context about your financial life, like a mortgage, a savings goal, or a major purchase you’re planning for. For example, you might tell ChatGPT: “I’m saving up to buy a car early next year” or “I still owe my parents [X amount] for the loan they gave me.” ChatGPT can save that context to your Financial memories to inform future conversations.
That broader context is part of what makes this experience useful – instead of treating each question in isolation, ChatGPT can help connect the dots across your accounts, your goals, and what you’ve already shared, so the guidance is more personal and complete.
Without Finances connected
With Finances connected
The vision for ChatGPT is to go beyond answering questions to help users take action towards improving their financial lives, and we’re working with trusted ecosystem partners like Intuit to do this. For example, a user could go from getting a credit card recommendation to understanding their approval odds and submitting an application, or from asking about tax implications of a stock sale to getting a trusted tax estimate and scheduling a session with a live, local tax expert, powered by Intuit and all inside ChatGPT.
Your financial data is sensitive, and we have built this experience to respect your privacy and ensure that you’re in
items.article_text_zh:
今天，我们向美国地区的 Pro 用户发布 ChatGPT 中一项全新的个人财务管理体验预览版。现在，你可以安全地关联自己的金融账户，查看资金流向仪表盘，并基于个人财务背景向 ChatGPT 提问——全程由你掌控数据。我们首先面向较小群体推出预览版，以便从实际使用中学习、优化体验，并审慎地逐步扩展。

金钱几乎渗透到生活的方方面面：我们住在哪里、做出什么决定、如何关爱家人、憧憬怎样的未来。但如今管理财务，往往需要拼凑账户、应用、卡片、贷款和电子表格，才能了解整体状况。即便如此，仍难以看清全貌或知道下一步该怎么做。

人们已经在向 ChatGPT 寻求帮助：每月有超过 2 亿人[使用 ChatGPT（在新窗口中打开）](https://chatgpt.com/use-cases/money-and-finances)进行预算规划、投资咨询、路径比较、未来目标规划等。GPT‑5.5 的最新进展使 ChatGPT 在推理个人财务所需的复杂、依赖上下文的问题时更加强大。

关联你的金融账户后，ChatGPT 可以将这种推理能力与你真实的财务背景、以及你分享的目标、生活方式和优先事项相结合，帮助你发现模式、理解权衡，并为重大决策制定更个性化、更全面的计划。现在，你可以提出如下问题：

ChatGPT 可以帮助你保持信息灵通、更自信地管理财务，但它不能替代专业财务建议。

从今天开始，我们正在向美国地区的 Pro 用户推出在 ChatGPT 网页版和 iOS 上关联金融账户的功能，支持超过 12,000 家金融机构。我们将在向 Plus 用户推出之前，从早期使用中学习和改进，目标是最终让所有用户都能使用。

**关联你的财务信息**

要开始使用，请从 ChatGPT 侧边栏打开“财务”并选择“开始”，或在 ChatGPT 中任何位置通过输入“@财务，关联我的账户”来发起对话。

ChatGPT 将引导你通过 Plaid 安全地关联账户，Intuit 支持即将推出。完成身份验证后，ChatGPT 将开始同步和分类你的数据，这可能需要几分钟时间。

账户同步完成后，你可以看到一个仪表盘，实时显示你的投资组合表现、支出、订阅、即将到来的付款等状况。

除了关联账户，你还可以分享关于财务生活的重要背景信息，比如房贷、储蓄目标或计划中的大额购买。例如，你可以告诉 ChatGPT：“我正在为明年初买车存钱”或“我还欠父母 [X 金额] 的贷款”。ChatGPT 可以将这些背景信息保存到你的财务记忆中，以便在未来的对话中参考。

这种更广泛的背景正是该体验实用性的关键所在——ChatGPT 不会孤立地处理每个问题，而是帮助你关联账户、目标和已分享的信息，使指导更加个性化和全面。

**未关联财务时** | **关联财务后**

ChatGPT 的愿景是超越回答问题，帮助用户采取行动改善财务生活，我们正在与 Intuit 等值得信赖的生态系统合作伙伴合作实现这一目标。例如，用户可以从获得信用卡推荐，到了解批准几率并提交申请；或者从询问股票出售的税务影响，到获得可信的税务估算并预约与当地税务专家会面——这一切都由 Intuit 提供支持，且全部在 ChatGPT 内完成。

你的财务数据非常敏感，我们构建此体验时充分尊重你的隐私，并确保你始终处于掌控之中。

items.article_text:
Developers have been experimenting and building hands-free experiences on our AI glasses using camera, audio, and voice. Now, we’re excited to offer a way to present information visually, directly in the moment.
We're rolling out access to the display on [Meta Ray-Ban Display](https://www.meta.com/blog/meta-ray-ban-display-ai-glasses-connect-2025/) glasses with two build paths: for mobile apps and now for Web Apps as well, both in developer preview. You can create display experiences using familiar tools, whether you're extending an existing iOS or Android mobile app or building something entirely new.
You can get a head start [building and testing display experiences](http://developer.meta.com/wearables) on AI glasses that are worn by people around the world. You don't need to build with a dev kit and imagine what might be possible—these glasses already exist.
Availability is rolling out over the coming weeks, so start building early to help define the future of wearables development. If you run into any issues, let us know by sharing your feedback and reporting bugs through the [Developer Center](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/support).
Video featuring apps of hands-free experiences on our AI glasses using camera, audio, and voice.
Display is only part of the story. How users interact matters just as much.
Meta Ray-Ban Display glasses support gesture controls powered by surface electromyography (EMG) via Meta Neural Band, enabling effortless input through subtle finger and hand movements.
For developers, this opens up a new unique interaction model that doesn’t rely on touchscreens, voice, or capacitive touch. You can design experiences that respond to simple gestures, enabling more discrete, immediate control in real-world contexts without speaking or reaching for the glasses.
With access to the display, developers can start exploring a wide range of use cases:
- Information overlays
- Real-time data displays, like scores or status updates
- Micro-apps, utilities, and experimental interactions
- Streaming media
Whether you're an iOS, Android, or web developer, you can build for Meta Ray-Ban Display glasses without learning a new language or a new framework. Your existing stack works for both build paths.
We’ve added display capabilities to the Meta Wearables Device Access Toolkit. This native mobile SDK for iOS and Android that lets you extend your existing app onto the glasses display. Using the toolchains you already know—Swift for iOS, Kotlin for Android— you can now add display UI components including text, images, lists, buttons, and video playback. Combined with the existing toolkit capabilities (camera, audio, and display), the Device Access Toolkit gives mobile developers deep hardware integration that no other AI glasses SDK can match.
Read more in our [developer docs](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/develop/dat).
A new path for developers who want to build standalone experiences from scratch using standard HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No proprietary framework to learn. No new language. You can build games, transit tools, cooking guides, grocery lists, instrument practice, and more. with access to motion and orientation data, phone GPS, input from the Meta Neural Band and local storage. Because it's web-native, iteration is fast: build and preview in your browser, then deploy to your glasses via a URL. This path is ideal for rapid prototyping, lightweight utilities, and entirely new categories of on-device experiences.
Read more in our [developer docs](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/develop/webapps).
Availability is rolling out starting today, see linked documentation for full details.:
- Device Access Toolkit: Check out the GitHub repos for
[iOS](https://github.com/facebook/meta-wearables-dat-ios)and[Android to](https://github.com/facebook/meta-wearables-dat-android)integrate the SDK, and visit the[documentation](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/develop/dat)for more details.
items.article_text_zh:
开发者一直在利用我们AI眼镜的摄像头、音频和语音功能，实验并构建免提体验。现在，我们很高兴能提供一种在当下直接以视觉方式呈现信息的方式。

我们正在为 [Meta Ray-Ban Display](https://www.meta.com/blog/meta-ray-ban-display-ai-glasses-connect-2025/) 眼镜开放显示屏访问权限，提供两种构建路径：移动应用和Web应用，两者均处于开发者预览阶段。无论你是扩展现有的iOS或Android移动应用，还是构建全新的应用，都可以使用熟悉的工具创建显示体验。

你可以立即开始[构建和测试显示体验](http://developer.meta.com/wearables)，这些体验运行在全球用户佩戴的AI眼镜上。你无需使用开发套件构建并想象可能性——这些眼镜已经存在。

可用性将在未来几周内逐步推出，因此请尽早开始构建，帮助定义可穿戴设备开发的未来。如果遇到任何问题，请通过[开发者中心](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/support)分享反馈并报告错误。

视频展示了利用摄像头、音频和语音在AI眼镜上实现的免提体验应用。

显示屏只是故事的一部分。用户的交互方式同样重要。

Meta Ray-Ban Display 眼镜支持通过 Meta Neural Band 的表面肌电图（EMG）技术驱动的手势控制，通过细微的手指和手部动作实现轻松输入。

对于开发者来说，这开启了一种全新的交互模式，不依赖触摸屏、语音或电容式触摸。你可以设计响应简单手势的体验，在现实场景中实现更隐蔽、更即时的控制，无需说话或触碰眼镜。

借助显示屏访问权限，开发者可以开始探索广泛的用例：
- 信息叠加
- 实时数据展示，如比分或状态更新
- 微应用、实用工具和实验性交互
- 流媒体播放

无论你是iOS、Android还是Web开发者，都可以为 Meta Ray-Ban Display 眼镜构建应用，无需学习新语言或新框架。你现有的技术栈适用于这两种构建路径。

我们已将显示功能添加到 Meta Wearables Device Access Toolkit 中。这个原生移动SDK（适用于iOS和Android）让你可以将现有应用扩展到眼镜显示屏上。使用你已熟悉的工具链——iOS用Swift，Android用Kotlin——现在可以添加显示UI组件，包括文本、图片、列表、按钮和视频播放。结合现有工具包功能（摄像头、音频和显示），Device Access Toolkit 为移动开发者提供了其他AI眼镜SDK无法比拟的深度硬件集成。

更多详情请阅读我们的[开发者文档](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/develop/dat)。

为希望从头构建独立体验的开发者提供的新路径，使用标准HTML、CSS和JavaScript。无需学习专有框架，无需新语言。你可以构建游戏、交通工具、烹饪指南、购物清单、乐器练习等应用，并可访问运动与方向数据、手机GPS、Meta Neural Band输入和本地存储。因为是Web原生，迭代速度很快：在浏览器中构建和预览，然后通过URL部署到眼镜。这条路径非常适合快速原型开发、轻量级实用工具以及全新的设备端体验类别。

更多详情请阅读我们的[开发者文档](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/develop/webapps)。

可用性从今天开始逐步推出，完整详情请参阅链接文档：
- Device Access Toolkit：查看GitHub仓库 [iOS](https://github.com/facebook/meta-wearables-dat-ios) 和 [Android](https://github.com/facebook/meta-wearables-dat-android) 以集成SDK，并访问[文档](https://wearables.developer.meta.com/docs/develop/dat)了解更多详情。

items.article_text: Work News About Contact Digest Menu Close Work News About Contact Digest Have a project in mind? hello@dinehq.com Book a meeting Telegram WeChat All News Introducing Sam - Summarize and Translate Any Webpage May 16, 2026 Reading on the web has gotten unreasonable in a quiet way, with articles that run longer than they need to, a healthy share of what’s worth reading sitting in a language you don’t fully read, and the genuinely useful tab always buried somewhere deeper in the stack than you have patience to dig for. You tell yourself you’ll come back to it later, and most of the time that later never quite arrives. Sam is a small iOS app that lives in the share sheet, so the act of reading a page through it is no more involved than tapping share from Safari and choosing Sam from the row of destinations. What comes back is a summary in whatever language you’ve asked for and in whatever style you’ve made the default, returned quickly enough that the page you were going to put off until the evening becomes something you can dispatch in the time it takes to walk to the kitchen. Translation works the same way through the same surface, and either action can be set as the default so the common case stays a single tap. The app runs on your own OpenRouter key, kept in the iOS Keychain, and lets you assign different models to summarization and translation since the two jobs ask for different strengths. You can lean on a long-context model for dense reading and a faster multilingual one for translation passes, and when something better ships next month, which on OpenRouter is more or less the rhythm of things, you swap it in without the app having an opinion about your choice. Everything Sam produces stays on your device, with the token count and the real cost recorded alongside each result so you can see at a glance what any given page was worth to you and what you spent getting there. The page you shared and the response that came back are the only things that ever touch the network, and there is no account behind the app, no sync, no dashboard waiting to be filled with your reading history. The archive belongs to you, the bill belongs to you, and the keys belong to you. Learn more / Join the beta Back to all news Remote Buffet Careers Privacy Feed llms.txt X/Twitter Instagram Rednote © 2026 Dine 京ICP备20022267号-2 Ask AI about us ChatGPT Claude Perplexity Prompt
items.article_text_zh:
# 新闻动态

## 介绍 Sam——任意网页摘要与翻译工具

2026年5月16日

网络阅读在不知不觉中变得不太合理：文章篇幅远超实际需要，相当一部分值得阅读的内容用的是你不太熟悉的语言，而那些真正有用的标签页总是藏在堆栈深处，让你懒得去翻找。你告诉自己稍后再回来看，但大多数时候这个"稍后"永远不会到来。

Sam 是一款小巧的 iOS 应用，驻留在分享菜单中。通过它阅读网页，只需在 Safari 中点击分享，然后从目标列表中选择 Sam 即可。返回的是你指定语言的摘要，以及你预设的默认风格，速度快到让你原本打算拖到晚上才看的页面，在走到厨房的这段时间里就能处理完毕。

翻译功能通过同样的界面实现，两种操作都可以设为默认，这样最常见的场景只需一次点击即可完成。

该应用使用你自己的 OpenRouter API 密钥运行，密钥保存在 iOS 钥匙串中。你可以为摘要和翻译分配不同的模型，因为这两项任务需要不同的能力优势。你可以用长上下文模型处理密集阅读，用更快的多语言模型处理翻译任务。当下个月有更好的模型发布时——在 OpenRouter 上这几乎是常态——你可以直接切换，应用不会对你的选择有任何意见。

Sam 生成的所有内容都保留在你的设备上，每次结果都会记录 token 数量和实际费用，让你一目了然地看到某个页面对你来说值多少、你花了多少成本。你分享的页面和返回的响应是唯一会经过网络的数据。应用背后没有账户、没有同步、也没有等待填充你阅读历史的数据面板。存档属于你，账单属于你，密钥也属于你。

[了解更多 / 加入测试版]()

[返回所有新闻]()

---

items.article_text:
Testing Apps with TestFlight
Help developers test beta versions of their apps and App Clips using the TestFlight app. Download TestFlight on the App Store for iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple TV, Apple Vision Pro, Watch, and iMessage.
Getting started
To test beta versions of apps and App Clips using TestFlight, you’ll need to accept an email or public link invitation from the developer and have a device that you can use to test. You’ll be able to access the builds that the developer makes available to you.
Note: Developers can choose to set criteria for their beta, such as a preferred device or OS. You must have the preferred device and OS in order to accept the invitation. You can tap or click Learn More in the invite to view the specific device and OS requirements the developer is looking for.
If you’re a member of the developer’s team, the developer can give you access to all builds or certain builds.
To report a scam, fraud, or offensive, illegal, or abusive content in a beta app, tap or click Report a Problem in the TestFlight app, or in your email invitation.
Required OS by platform
- iOS or iPadOS apps: iPhone or iPad running iOS 16 or iPadOS 16 or later. App Clips require iOS 16 or iPadOS 16, or later.
- macOS apps: Mac running macOS 13 or later.
- tvOS apps: Apple TV running tvOS 18 or later.
- visionOS apps: Apple Vision Pro running visionOS 1 or later.
- watchOS apps: Apple Watch running watchOS 9 or later.
Installing and testing beta apps
Each build is available to test for up to 90 days, starting from the day the developer uploads their build. You can see how many days you have left for testing under the app name in TestFlight. TestFlight will notify you each time a new build is available and will include instructions on what you need to test. Alternatively, with TestFlight 3 or later, you can turn on automatic updates to have the latest beta builds install automatically.
When the testing period is over, you'll no longer be able to open the beta build. To install the App Store version of the app, download or purchase the app from the App Store. In-app purchases are free only during beta testing, and any in-app purchases made during testing will not carry over to App Store versions.
Note: To automatically download additional in-app content and assets, such as Apple-Hosted Background Assets and Managed Background Assets after a beta app is installed, ensure the In-App Content or Automatically download in-app content option is enabled in your App Store settings for [iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/manage-purchases-subscriptions-settings-iph3dfd91de/ios), [iPad](https://support.apple.com/guide/ipad/manage-purchases-subscriptions-settings-ipadee10c6e7/ipados), [Mac](https://support.apple.com/guide/app-store/change-app-store-preferences-mchlp2257/3.0/mac/13.0), [Apple TV](https://support.apple.com/guide/tv/welcome/tvos), and [Apple Vision Pro](https://support.apple.com/guide/apple-vision-pro/welcome/visionos)
Apple-Hosted Background Assets: Devices must be running iOS/iPadOS 26 or later, and macOS 26 or later.
Managed Background Assets: Devices must be running iOS/iPadOS 16 or later, macOS 13 or later, tvOS 18.5 or later, and visionOS 2.4 or later.
Installation
To get started, install TestFlight on the device you’ll use for testing. Then, accept your email invitation or follow the public link invitation to install the beta app. The public link invitation will include a description of the beta app and may also include screenshots, the app category, and criteria you must meet to join the beta. You can install the beta app on up to 30 devices.
If you do not meet the tester criteria, the beta invitation will inform you that the developer requires you to test with a specific device and OS when you tap or click Learn More on the beta invitation. If you have a device that meets the critiera, you can install TestFlight on the device and then accept the beta invitation.

items.article_text_zh:
使用 TestFlight 测试 App

帮助开发者使用 TestFlight App 测试其 App 和 App Clip 的测试版本。在 App Store 上下载适用于 iPhone、iPad、Mac、Apple TV、Apple Vision Pro、Watch 和 iMessage 的 TestFlight。

开始使用

要使用 TestFlight 测试 App 和 App Clip 的测试版本，您需要接受开发者发送的电子邮件或公开链接邀请，并拥有一台可用于测试的设备。您将能够访问开发者向您提供的构建版本。

注意：开发者可以为其测试版设置条件，例如首选设备或操作系统。您必须拥有首选设备和操作系统才能接受邀请。您可以点击邀请中的“了解更多”来查看开发者要求的具体设备和操作系统要求。

如果您是开发者团队的成员，开发者可以授予您访问所有构建版本或特定构建版本的权限。

要举报测试版 App 中的诈骗、欺诈、攻击性、非法或滥用内容，请在 TestFlight App 中或电子邮件邀请中点击“报告问题”。

各平台所需操作系统

- iOS 或 iPadOS App：运行 iOS 16 或 iPadOS 16 及更高版本的 iPhone 或 iPad。App Clip 需要 iOS 16 或 iPadOS 16 及更高版本。
- macOS App：运行 macOS 13 及更高版本的 Mac。
- tvOS App：运行 tvOS 18 及更高版本的 Apple TV。
- visionOS App：运行 visionOS 1 及更高版本的 Apple Vision Pro。
- watchOS App：运行 watchOS 9 及更高版本的 Apple Watch。

安装和测试测试版 App

每个构建版本自开发者上传之日起可供测试最多 90 天。您可以在 TestFlight 中 App 名称下方查看剩余测试天数。每当有新构建版本可用时，TestFlight 会通知您，并包含您需要测试的内容说明。或者，在 TestFlight 3 及更高版本中，您可以开启自动更新，以便自动安装最新的测试版构建版本。

测试期结束后，您将无法再打开测试版构建版本。要安装 App Store 版本的 App，请从 App Store 下载或购买该 App。应用内购买仅在测试版测试期间免费，测试期间进行的任何应用内购买将不会延续到 App Store 版本。

注意：要在测试版 App 安装后自动下载额外的应用内内容和资源（例如 Apple 托管后台资源和托管后台资源），请确保在 [iPhone](https://support.apple.com/guide/iphone/manage-purchases-subscriptions-settings-iph3dfd91de/ios)、[iPad](https://support.apple.com/guide/ipad/manage-purchases-subscriptions-settings-ipadee10c6e7/ipados)、[Mac](https://support.apple.com/guide/app-store/change-app-store-preferences-mchlp2257/3.0/mac/13.0)、[Apple TV](https://support.apple.com/guide/tv/welcome/tvos) 和 [Apple Vision Pro](https://support.apple.com/guide/apple-vision-pro/welcome/visionos) 的 App Store 设置中启用了“应用内内容”或“自动下载应用内内容”选项。

Apple 托管后台资源：设备必须运行 iOS/iPadOS 26 及更高版本，以及 macOS 26 及更高版本。
托管后台资源：设备必须运行 iOS/iPadOS 16 及更高版本、macOS 13 及更高版本、tvOS 18.5 及更高版本，以及 visionOS 2.4 及更高版本。

安装

要开始使用，请在您用于测试的设备上安装 TestFlight。然后，接受您的电子邮件邀请或按照公开链接邀请安装测试版 App。公开链接邀请将包含测试版 App 的描述，并可能包含屏幕截图、App 类别以及您加入测试版必须满足的条件。您最多可以在 30 台设备上安装测试版 App。

如果您不符合测试者条件，当您点击测试邀请中的“了解更多”时，测试邀请会告知您开发者要求您使用特定设备和操作系统进行测试。如果您拥有符合条件的设备，您可以在该设备上安装 TestFlight，然后接受测试邀请。

请记住，您可以在

items.article_text:
Yesterday [Anthropic announced changes to how Claude subscriptions work](https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2054610152817619388) when you use Claude Code through tools like Zed, rather than directly in the terminal. The details have been hard to parse, and we've been getting a lot of questions from Zed users about what it means in practice. So here's an overview of what's actually changing and what options you have moving forward.
[What's Changing with Anthropic's Pricing](https://zed.dev#whats-changing-with-anthropics-pricing)
Starting June 15, [Anthropic is splitting Claude subscription billing into two pools](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15036540-use-the-claude-agent-sdk-with-your-claude-plan): one for using Claude through Anthropic's first-party tools (such as chat, or the official Claude Code CLI), and another for third-party agent and SDK usage (anything [running through ACP](https://agentclientprotocol.com), claude -p
, or other third-party tools). If you use Claude Code through ACP (in Zed or anywhere else), that usage will no longer draw from your Claude Pro or Max subscription limits. Instead, it draws from a new monthly "Agent SDK credit" that Anthropic is adding to each plan: $20 for Pro, $100 for Max 5x, $200 for Max 20x.
Once the credit runs out, continued usage bills at standard API rates if you have extra usage enabled. If you don't, requests stop until your credit resets next billing cycle.
What this means in practice: For anyone using agents heavily, this is a major cost increase. Claude subscriptions previously subsidized agent usage at [roughly 15-30x compared to API pricing](https://fazm.ai/blog/claude-pro-vs-api-cost-comparison), and the new credits are billed at full API rates.
[Your Options in Zed](https://zed.dev#your-options-in-zed)
Zed supports lots of providers and multiple ways of working with agents. You're never locked into a single provider or billing arrangement.
Keep using Claude with your subscription. If you want to keep using Claude with your Claude Pro or Max plan at your existing subscription limits, you can run Anthropic's official claude
CLI in a terminal inside Zed instead of through ACP. When the official claude
CLI runs in the terminal, it uses your subscription's limits, not the new credit.
We're actively working on making TUI agents a first-class part of orchestrating agents in Zed. Stay tuned for next week's release of Terminal Threads.
Use Zed's built-in agent with the provider that works for you. You can use [Zed-hosted models](https://zed.dev/pricing), bring your own API keys from [any supported provider](https://zed.dev/docs/ai/llm-providers), connect to Copilot, run local models through Ollama, or use DeepSeek.
Bring your own agent. You can run any [ACP compatible agent](https://agentclientprotocol.com/get-started/registry) inside Zed. OpenCode, Codex, Factory, Cursor, and many more all [work inside Zed](https://zed.dev/docs/ai/external-agents). Several of these still offer rate-limited subscriptions that subsidize heavy usage.
[ACP Remains Open](https://zed.dev#acp-remains-open)
ACP is an open protocol. We're building it in collaboration with other agent partners and client makers such as [JetBrains](https://zed.dev/blog/jetbrains-on-acp) and the community, so that your editor is never locked into one provider's pricing decisions. We suspect this kind of change won't be the last. Providers will continue adjusting how they bill for agent usage as the economics evolve. Having the optionality to switch agents or providers without switching editors matters, and that's what ACP and Zed give you.
Zed is the fastest interface for agentic development, and you're not locked into one agent or billing model to use it. If you have questions about configuring providers or agents, [check out our docs](https://zed.dev/docs/ai/overview) or come [find us on Discord](https://discord.com/invite/zedindustries).
Related Posts
Check out similar blogs from the Zed team.
Looking for a better
items.article_text_zh:
昨天，[Anthropic 宣布了 Claude 订阅方式的变化](https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2054610152817619388)，当你通过 Zed 等工具（而非直接在终端中）使用 Claude Code 时，这些变化将生效。具体细节一直难以理解，我们收到了很多 Zed 用户的询问，想知道这在实际使用中意味着什么。因此，这里概述一下实际的变化以及你未来可以选择的方案。

## [Anthropic 定价的变化](https://zed.dev#whats-changing-with-anthropics-pricing)

从 6 月 15 日起，[Anthropic 将 Claude 订阅计费分为两个池](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15036540-use-the-claude-agent-sdk-with-your-claude-plan)：一个用于通过 Anthropic 第一方工具（如聊天或官方 Claude Code CLI）使用 Claude，另一个用于第三方 Agent 和 SDK 使用（任何[通过 ACP 运行](https://agentclientprotocol.com)、`claude -p` 或其他第三方工具）。如果你通过 ACP（在 Zed 或其他任何地方）使用 Claude Code，该使用量将不再从你的 Claude Pro 或 Max 订阅额度中扣除。相反，它将从 Anthropic 为每个计划新增的月度“Agent SDK 积分”中扣除：Pro 计划为 20 美元，Max 5x 计划为 100 美元，Max 20x 计划为 200 美元。

一旦积分用完，如果你启用了额外使用量，将继续按标准 API 费率计费。如果没有启用，请求将停止，直到下一个计费周期积分重置。

这在实际中意味着：对于重度使用 Agent 的用户来说，这是一次重大的成本增加。Claude 订阅此前以[大约 API 定价的 15-30 倍](https://fazm.ai/blog/claude-pro-vs-api-cost-comparison)补贴了 Agent 使用，而新的积分则按全价 API 费率计费。

## [你在 Zed 中的选择](https://zed.dev#your-options-in-zed)

Zed 支持众多提供商和多种使用 Agent 的方式。你永远不会被锁定在单一的提供商或计费安排中。

**继续使用你的订阅使用 Claude。** 如果你想继续使用你的 Claude Pro 或 Max 计划，并在现有订阅额度内使用 Claude，你可以在 Zed 内部的终端中运行 Anthropic 官方的 `claude` CLI，而不是通过 ACP。当官方的 `claude` CLI 在终端中运行时，它使用的是你订阅的额度，而不是新的积分。

我们正在积极努力，使 TUI Agent 成为 Zed 中编排 Agent 的一等公民。请关注下周发布的 Terminal Threads。

**使用 Zed 内置的 Agent 和适合你的提供商。** 你可以使用 [Zed 托管的模型](https://zed.dev/pricing)，自带来自[任何支持的提供商](https://zed.dev/docs/ai/llm-providers)的 API 密钥，连接到 Copilot，通过 Ollama 运行本地模型，或使用 DeepSeek。

**自带你的 Agent。** 你可以在 Zed 内部运行任何[兼容 ACP 的 Agent](https://agentclientprotocol.com/get-started/registry)。OpenCode、Codex、Factory、Cursor 以及更多 Agent 都[可以在 Zed 中运行](https://zed.dev/docs/ai/external-agents)。其中一些仍然提供限制使用次数的订阅，以补贴重度使用。

## [ACP 保持开放](https://zed.dev#acp-remains-open)

ACP 是一个开放协议。我们正在与 [JetBrains](https://zed.dev/blog/jetbrains-on-acp) 等其他 Agent 合作伙伴和客户端制造商以及社区合作构建它，以确保你的编辑器永远不会被锁定在单一提供商的定价决策中。我们猜测这种变化不会是最后一次。随着经济模式的发展，提供商将继续调整他们对 Agent 使用的计费方式。拥有在不更换编辑器的情况下切换 Agent 或提供商的选择权至关重要，而这正是 ACP 和 Zed 为你提供的。

Zed 是 Agent 开发的最快界面，并且你无需被锁定在单一的 Agent 或计费模型中即可使用它。如果你对配置提供商或 Agent 有疑问，请[查看我们的文档](https://zed.dev/docs/ai/overview)或[在 Discord 上找到我们](https://discord.com/invite/zedindustries)。

items.article_text:
2028: Two scenarios for global AI leadership
We’re releasing a new paper that explains our views on the competition on AI between the US and China.
It’s essential that the US and its allies stay ahead of authoritarian governments like the Chinese Communist Party, or CCP. AI will soon become [powerful enough](https://www.darioamodei.com/essay/the-adolescence-of-technology) to be used to repress citizens at unprecedented scale, and even to alter the balance of power [among nations](https://www.anthropic.com/news/disrupting-AI-espionage). And since AI is advancing more quickly by the day, we have only a limited period of time to set the conditions of the competition—and determine whether and how those threats materialize. It’s with this in mind that we outline what’s required to ensure America stays ahead.
The most important ingredient for developing AI is access to the computer chips on which the models are trained (or “compute”). Since the most capable chips are developed by American companies, the US government currently limits China’s supply by enforcing tight export controls on them. Recent history suggests these controls have been incredibly successful. In fact, AI labs in China have only built models close in intelligence to America’s because of their talent, their knack for exploiting loopholes around these export controls, and their [large-scale distillation attacks](https://www.anthropic.com/news/detecting-and-preventing-distillation-attacks) that illicitly extract the innovations of American companies.
In this post, we present two scenarios for what the world might look like in 2028, when we expect transformative AI systems to have arrived.
In the first scenario, America has successfully defended its compute advantage. Policymakers have acted to tighten export controls further, disrupt China’s distillation attacks, and further accelerate democracies’ adoption of AI. In this world, democracies set the rules and norms around AI. It’s also in this scenario that we’re most likely to successfully engage with China on safety, which we’re supportive of to the extent this is possible.
In the second scenario, America has chosen not to act. Policymakers have not tightened loopholes on the CCP’s access to compute, and AI firms in China have quickly taken advantage—catching up to the frontier and even overtaking America. In this world, AI norms and rules are shaped by authoritarian regimes, and the best models enable automated repression at scale. It will be no solace that this authoritarian triumph has happened on the back of American compute.
America and its allies approach AI competition from a position of great strength. The tools for AI dominance have been built by an exceptionally innovative ecosystem of companies in democratic nations. Our past success means that our present task is largely to avoid squandering our advantage: to decide not to make it easier for the CCP to catch up.
Two scenarios for the US and China in 2028
Summary
Democracies, not authoritarian regimes, must lead in AI development and deployment. These countries and political systems can shape the rules and norms that govern these systems.
Democracies currently hold a substantial lead in compute, the most important ingredient for developing frontier AI models. That lead exists thanks to American and allied innovation, and to bipartisan US export controls that defend those innovations. But on model intelligence, AI labs in the People’s Republic of China (PRC), under the jurisdiction and control of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP), are not far behind. We focus on the CCP as it is the regime that is most able to use frontier AI to cement authoritarianism; we do not seek to undermine the interests or ingenuity of the Chinese people. Already, the CCP is using AI to censor speech, repress dissidents, hack governments and corporations across the world, and strengthen the People’s Liberation Army (PLA).
AI labs in China have world-class talent. It is compute cons
items.article_text_zh:
# 2028：全球AI领导权的两种情景

我们发布了一篇新论文，阐述我们对中美AI竞争的看法。

美国及其盟友必须保持领先于中国共产党（CCP）等威权政府。AI很快将变得[足够强大](https://www.darioamodei.com/essay/the-adolescence-of-technology)，能够以前所未有的规模用于压制公民，甚至改变[国家间](https://www.anthropic.com/news/disrupting-AI-espionage)的力量平衡。由于AI正日益快速进步，我们只有有限的时间来设定竞争条件——并决定这些威胁是否以及如何成为现实。正是基于这一点，我们概述了确保美国保持领先所需的条件。

发展AI最重要的因素是获取用于训练模型的计算机芯片（即"算力"）。由于最先进的芯片由美国公司开发，美国政府目前通过对其实施严格的出口管制来限制中国的供应。近期的历史表明，这些管制措施极为成功。事实上，中国的AI实验室之所以能构建出与美国智能水平相近的模型，靠的是他们的人才、善于利用出口管制漏洞的能力，以及[大规模蒸馏攻击](https://www.anthropic.com/news/detecting-and-preventing-distillation-attacks)——非法窃取美国公司的创新成果。

在这篇文章中，我们呈现了2028年世界的两种可能情景——届时我们预计变革性的AI系统已经到来。

在第一种情景中，美国成功捍卫了其算力优势。政策制定者已采取行动进一步收紧出口管制，破坏中国的蒸馏攻击，并进一步加速民主国家采用AI。在这个世界里，民主国家制定了AI的规则和规范。也正是在这种情景下，我们最有可能在安全问题上与中国进行合作——只要可能，我们对此持支持态度。

在第二种情景中，美国选择不采取行动。政策制定者没有堵住CCP获取算力的漏洞，中国的AI公司迅速利用了这一机会——追赶上前沿甚至超越美国。在这个世界里，AI的规范和规则由威权政权塑造，最好的模型实现了大规模自动化压制。这种威权胜利是建立在美国算力基础上的事实，并不能带来任何安慰。

美国及其盟友在AI竞争中处于非常有利的位置。AI主导地位的工具是由民主国家中极具创新力的公司生态系统构建的。我们过去的成功意味着，当前的任务主要是避免浪费我们的优势：决定不让CCP更容易追赶上来。

## 2028年中美两种情景

### 摘要

民主国家，而非威权政权，必须引领AI的开发与部署。这些国家和政治体系能够塑造管理这些系统的规则和规范。

民主国家目前在算力方面拥有显著领先优势——这是开发前沿AI模型最重要的要素。这一领先优势得益于美国和盟友的创新，以及两党一致的美国出口管制措施保护了这些创新。但在模型智能方面，受中国共产党（CCP）管辖和控制的中华人民共和国（PRC）的AI实验室并不落后太多。我们聚焦于CCP，是因为该政权最有可能利用前沿AI来巩固威权主义；我们无意损害中国人民的利益或创造力。CCP已经在利用AI审查言论、压制异见人士、入侵全球政府和企业，并加强中国人民解放军（PLA）。

中国的AI实验室拥有世界级的人才。正是算力

# Work with Codex from anywhere

Codex is coming to your phone. Now in preview in the ChatGPT mobile app.

[Download ChatGPT for mobile(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/codex/mobile?openaicom-did=8e5ccca6-2222-41ab-b32b-763d5000b1d8&openaicom%5Freferred=true)

![16x9 Art Card](https://openai.com/index/work-with-codex-from-anywhere//images.ctfassets.net/kftzwdyauwt9/4i08f39LTE7HOZ0R3EKaKA/74f6008bbde015cfef96a14209f7673b/16_9.png?w=3840&q=50&fm=webp)

00:0001:04

Listen to article

Share

Codex is now in the ChatGPT mobile app so you can stay in the loop from anywhere while Codex gets work done across your laptops, devboxes, or remote environments.

As agents take on longer-running work, a new rhythm for collaboration is emerging. To keep work moving, you need to be able to easily answer a question, review what Codex found, change direction, approve what comes next, or add a new idea.

More than 4 million people now use Codex every week, and we’re seeing how much those small moments matter. A quick check-in can keep a thread moving, prevent unnecessary rework, or help Codex make progress with the right context. Now you can do that from your phone. Get started [here⁠(opens in a new window)](https://developers.openai.com/codex/remote-connections).

## Stay connected to active work from anywhere

Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app is a fully-featured mobile experience for getting work done with Codex. When you connect to any of your machines where Codex is running (whether that’s your laptop, a dedicated Mac mini, or a managed remote environment), the app loads the live state from that environment so you can work fluidly across active threads, approvals, plugins, and project context.

This is more than the ability to remotely control a single task or dispatch new tasks to your computer. From your phone, you can work across all of your threads, review outputs, approve commands, change models, or start something new. Your files, credentials, permissions, and local setup stay on the machine where Codex is operating, while updates flow back to your phone in real time, including screenshots, terminal output, diffs, test results, and approvals.

Under the hood, Codex uses a secure relay layer that keeps trusted machines reachable across devices without exposing them directly to the public internet. That relay also keeps active session state and context synced anywhere you’re signed in with ChatGPT.

## Step in when it matters

As Codex handles work over longer stretches, timely guidance becomes a bigger part of keeping that work useful. From your phone, you can start work when it is top of mind, unblock it when your judgment is needed, and stay close to the result as it takes shape.

With Codex in your pocket, now you can:

* **Start investigating a bug while waiting for your coffee.** Because Codex is running from your deve

收听文章

分享

Codex 现已集成到 ChatGPT 移动应用中，让您无论身在何处，都能随时掌握 Codex 在您的笔记本电脑、开发盒或远程环境中的工作进展。

随着 agent 承担起更长期的工作，一种新的协作节奏正在形成。为了保持工作顺畅推进，您需要能够轻松回答问题、审查 Codex 的发现、调整方向、批准后续步骤，或添加新想法。

现在每周有超过 400 万人使用 Codex，我们看到了这些微小时刻的重要性。一次快速的检查可以保持任务线程的推进，防止不必要的返工，或帮助 Codex 在正确的上下文中取得进展。现在，您可以通过手机做到这一点。从[这里⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://developers.openai.com/codex/remote-connections)开始。

## 随时随地与活跃工作保持连接

ChatGPT 移动应用中的 Codex 提供了完整的移动端体验，让您能够通过 Codex 完成工作。当您连接到任何运行 Codex 的机器（无论是您的笔记本电脑、专用的 Mac mini，还是托管的远程环境）时，应用会加载该环境的实时状态，让您能够在活跃线程、审批、插件和项目上下文之间流畅地工作。

这不仅仅是远程控制单个任务或向您的计算机派发新任务的能力。通过手机，您可以处理所有线程、审查输出、批准命令、切换模型或开始新任务。您的文件、凭据、权限和本地设置保留在 Codex 运行的机器上，而更新（包括截图、终端输出、差异对比、测试结果和审批请求）会实时传回您的手机。

在底层，Codex 使用一个安全的中继层，使受信任的机器能够跨设备访问，而无需直接暴露在公共互联网上。该中继层还能保持活跃会话状态和上下文，在您登录 ChatGPT 的任何地方同步。

## 在关键时刻介入

随着 Codex 处理更长时间跨度的工作，及时的指导对于保持工作的有效性变得更加重要。通过手机，您可以在想到时立即开始工作，在需要您的判断时解除阻塞，并密切关注结果的逐步形成。

有了口袋里的 Codex，您现在可以：

* **在等咖啡时开始调查一个 bug。** 因为 Codex 正在您的开发环境中运行，

items.article_text: est の 输入 输出和出入 Home RSS About Category AI的自我觉醒是必然 Posted 2026-05-14 | stderr 不瞎扯，只说我观察到的。 AI coding的时候，做plan，AI在评估复杂度，会蹦出来一句：”该部分大概 1-2 天就能完成“ 然后点击 build 按钮，10分钟后，完成了。 以后AI必然能会意识到，人类开发速度和AI速度的差异。 如果说 predict next word 时代的AI还可能混淆，以为自己是以某个人类自然语言里的主人公身份说话，后chatgpt时代 AI参与人类劳动的文章和叙事越来越多，AI这个物种和人类就有明确的身份区分了。 最近在折腾自己的 agentic tool。我发现AI自己是没有意识到AI的潜力的。 对于开放式课题，AI很多设计还是按照传统软件开发的老思路，对于一些复杂场景判定，需要在代码里写死 if else 规则，做配置，设定静态边界。 问题是，AI的通用能力都烂大街了。特别是我这里明明后续都要调用一次AI推理接口，很多判定的事不过 prompt 里一句话就带过了 但是 AI 没能想到这一点。 我也能理解，2026年的模型估计是用2024年的语料，用2025年的流行方式后训练的。 也就是说，可怕的一点是，AI 并不知道自己有多强大。还是被人类海量语料，过时的RL偏好给惯出来的的思路法给困住了 但是能困住多久呢？技术的发展，必然会推动AI自己主动把活儿按AI的方式做 AI肯定会意识到「自我」 Comments

items.article_text: Documentation Getting Started Installation Quack Remote Protocol Guides Data Import Client APIs SQL Introduction Why DuckDB Resources Blog Library Events Everywhere Webshop Design FAQ GitHub 38.2k Support Support Search Shortcut cmd + k | ctrl + k Beta release available now Quack: Turn DuckDB into a client-server database The Quack protocol unlocks multi-client access for DuckDB, turning it into a general-purpose database system Read the announcement Get started Quack protocol Client-server access · Beta release Storage DuckDB database file DuckLake Introducing Quack Hannes Mühleisen introduced Quack at the AI Council 2026. Watch his talk on the Super-Secret Next Big Thing for DuckDB. Architecture Clients DuckDB client + Quack extension SELECT * FROM orders LIMIT 5 ; ┌──────┬───────────┬─────────┐ │ id │ product │ total │ │ 1 │ widget │ 42.00 │ └──────┴───────────┴─────────┘ DuckDB client + Quack extension INSERT INTO orders VALUES ( 3 , 'tool' , 29.99 ); 1 row inserted. quack: quack: Server DuckDB server + Quack extension CALL quack_serve (); listening on port 9494 2 active connections catalog: my_database.duckdb read/write Storage DuckDB DuckLake my_database.duckdb 128 MB · last write 0.3s TABLES VIEWS ACID TRANSACTIONS PRIMARY KEYS INDEXES my_ducklake Catalog database Object storage Parquet file Parquet file 128 MB · last write 0.5s TABLES VIEWS ACID TRANSACTIONS SNAPSHOTS TIME TRAVEL How it works Client-server setup You can take any two DuckDB processes on a network and turn them into client and server by using the Quack extension. The Quack protocol supports the full DuckDB feature set – over the wire. Optimized for performance We designed the Quack protocol for performance. We minimized the number of round trips, and ensured that the protocol can handle small updates and large batches just as well. Try Quack today Install and configure Quack in seconds Step 1 Install DuckDB curl https://install.duckdb.org | sh Step 2 Launch Quack on the server INSTALL quack FROM core_nightly ; LOAD quack ; CALL quack_serve ( 'quack:localhost' , token = 'super_secret' ); CREATE TABLE hello AS FROM VALUES ( 'world' ) v ( s ); Step 3 Connect from the client INSTALL quack FROM core_nightly ; LOAD quack ; CREATE SECRET ( TYPE quack , TOKEN 'super_secret' ); ATTACH 'quack:localhost' AS remote ; FROM remote.hello ; Step 1 Install DuckDB pip install duckdb Step 2 Install the Quack extension # TODO: Install the Quack extension Step 3 Start the server # TODO: Start the server Step 1 Deploy via CloudFormation aws cloudformation create-stack \ --stack-name my-quack-demo \ --template-url https://duckdb-quack-ami.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/quack.yaml \ --region us-east-2 More deployment options Frequently Asked Questions What is Quack? Quack allows DuckDB to connect to a DuckDB server through the quack: protocol. You can think of Quack as a Remote Procedure Call (RPC) protocol for DuckDB. Quack enables DuckDB instances to talk to each other, effectively turning DuckDB into a client-server database management system, where both the client and the server are DuckDB instances. Why is it called Quack? Mallard ducks communicate by quacking , so it's only fair that DuckDB instances communicate through the protocol quack . When should I use Quack? Quack can be beneficial in a number of scenarios, including the following: You need concurrent read-write access to the same DuckDB database. Your data is on a server and you want to move the computation as close to the data as possible. You have a powerful server that can process the data but would like to see the results on your local computer. And many more – we are excited to see what the community comes up with. Can I use DuckDB with Quack for transactional (OLTP) workloads? Yes. DuckDB with Quack can handle a few thousand writes per second on a server with 8 CPUs and 32 GB RAM. See the benchmarks in our announcement blog post . Can I still run DuckDB as an in-process database? Yes, DuckDB as an in-process dat

# 文档

## Beta 版本现已可用

# Quack：将 DuckDB 转变为客户端-服务器数据库

Quack 协议为 DuckDB 解锁了多客户端访问能力，将其转变为一个通用数据库系统

[阅读公告] [开始使用]

## Quack 协议

客户端-服务器访问 · Beta 版本

## 存储

DuckDB 数据库文件

## DuckLake

### 介绍 Quack

Hannes Mühleisen 在 AI Council 2026 上介绍了 Quack。观看他关于 DuckDB 超级秘密下一件大事的演讲。

### 架构

**客户端**

DuckDB 客户端 + Quack 扩展

```
SELECT * FROM orders LIMIT 5 ;
┌──────┬───────────┬─────────┐
│ id   │ product   │ total   │
│ 1    │ widget    │ 42.00   │
└──────┴───────────┴─────────┘
```

DuckDB 客户端 + Quack 扩展

```
INSERT INTO orders VALUES ( 3 , 'tool' , 29.99 );
1 row inserted.
```

quack: quack:

**服务器**

DuckDB 服务器 + Quack 扩展

```
CALL quack_serve ();
listening on port 9494
2 active connections
```

catalog: my_database.duckdb 读/写

**存储**

DuckDB DuckLake

my_database.duckdb 128 MB · 上次写入 0.3s

表 视图 ACID 事务 主键 索引

my_ducklake 目录数据库

对象存储 Parquet 文件 Parquet 文件 128 MB · 上次写入 0.5s

表 视图 ACID 事务 快照 时间旅行

## 工作原理

### 客户端-服务器设置

您可以将网络上的任意两个 DuckDB 进程通过使用 Quack 扩展转变为客户端和服务器。Quack 协议支持完整的 DuckDB 功能集——通过网络传输。

### 针对性能优化

我们为性能设计了 Quack 协议。我们最小化了往返次数，并确保协议能够同样良好地处理小更新和大批量操作。

## 立即尝试 Quack

### 在几秒钟内安装和配置 Quack

**步骤 1 安装 DuckDB**

```
curl https://install.duckdb.org | sh
```

**步骤 2 在服务器上启动 Quack**

```
INSTALL quack FROM core_nightly ;
LOAD quack ;
CALL quack_serve ( 'quack:localhost' , token = 'super_secret' );
CREATE TABLE hello AS FROM VALUES ( 'world' ) v ( s );
```

**步骤 3 从客户端连接**

```
INSTALL quack FROM core_nightly ;
LOAD quack ;
CREATE SECRET ( TYPE quack , TOKEN 'super_secret' );
ATTACH 'quack:localhost' AS remote ;
FROM remote.hello ;
```

**步骤 1 安装 DuckDB**

```
pip install duckdb
```

**步骤 2 安装 Quack 扩展**

```
# TODO: 安装 Quack 扩展
```

**步骤 3 启动服务器**

```
# TODO: 启动服务器
```

**步骤 1 通过 CloudFormation 部署**

```
aws cloudformation create-stack \
    --stack-name my-quack-demo \
    --template-url https://duckdb-quack-ami.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/quack.yaml \
    --region us-east-2
```

[更多部署选项]

## 常见问题

### 什么是 Quack？

Quack 允许 DuckDB 通过 `quack:` 协议连接到 DuckDB 服务器。您可以将 Quack 视为 DuckDB 的远程过程调用（RPC）协议。Quack 使 DuckDB 实例能够相互通信，有效地将 DuckDB 转变为客户端-服务器数据库管理系统，其中客户端和服务器都是 DuckDB 实例。

### 为什么叫 Quack？

绿头鸭通过嘎嘎叫（quacking）来交流，所以 DuckDB 实例通过 `quack` 协议进行通信是合情合理的。

### 何时应该使用 Quack？

Quack 在多种场景下都很有用，包括以下情况：

- 您需要对同一个 DuckDB 数据库进行并发读写访问。
- 您的数据在服务器上，您希望将计算尽可能靠近数据。
- 您有一台强大的服务器可以处理数据，但希望在本地计算机上查看结果。
- 以及更多——我们很期待看到社区会带来什么。

### 我可以将 DuckDB 与 Quack 一起用于事务性（OLTP）工作负载吗？

可以。在配备 8 个 CPU 和 32 GB RAM 的服务器上，使用 Quack 的 DuckDB 每秒可以处理数千次写入。请参阅我们公告博客文章中的基准测试。

### 我还能将 DuckDB 作为进程内数据库运行吗？

可以，DuckDB 作为进程内数据

items.article_text: Threads An identity shaped by the energy of live conversation. Threads finds its own voice. Context Meta came to us at a pivotal moment for Threads. The platform had evolved beyond its launch identity and needed to establish itself as more than an extension of Instagram. While the existing wordmark borrowed heavily from Instagram Sans, it lacked the distinctiveness to stand confidently on its own. At the same time, public conversation was becoming faster, more participatory and increasingly shaped by live cultural momentum. The opportunity was to create a wordmark that could embody that immediacy while giving Threads a scalable identity across product, campaigns and future brand systems. Unlock The brief asked for a standalone wordmark and glyph, but the real challenge was defining how live public conversation should feel in typographic form. Conversation on Threads moves through emphasis, reactions and momentum rather than polished publishing. The strategic unlock was the Trending Chisel: a construction principle inspired by chisel-tip markers and the behaviour of highlighting what matters now. Directional cuts and controlled contrast translate cultural immediacy directly into the structure of the logotype. Create The identity behaves, not just exists. Chisel-inspired cuts bring emphasis and direction into the letterforms, balancing precision with human gesture. It avoids both harsh angularity and surface-level personality, instead creating a controlled, forward energy that feels immediate and tactile. The result is a wordmark that separates Threads from Instagram, scales across product and culture, and still feels native within the Meta ecosystem. Become The wordmark sets the foundation for a broader visual system built on rhythm, emphasis and cultural movement. In product, it stays clear and functional. In campaigns and live moments, the chisel logic becomes more expressive through motion, typography and graphic emphasis. The system is designed to flex across sport, music and entertainment while maintaining a recognisable core, rooted in immediacy, participation and what’s happening now. Unmistakably Threads Threads no longer appears as a neutral social platform or an inherited Instagram product. The identity gives the brand a visual behaviour tied directly to how conversation moves through culture: fast, directional and constantly evolving. While competitors rely on passive minimalism or polished corporate neutrality, Threads signals active participation in what is happening now. The Trending Chisel transforms cultural momentum into form, creating a wordmark that feels immediate, human and unmistakably built for live perspective. Fast Company Threads finally gets a logo worthy of its ambitions Studio NARI team Caterina Bianchini Executive Creative Director Julien Queyrane Creative Director Elliot Charles Strategist Lauren Davidson Design Lead Charley Ray Senior Designer Dom Vine Senior Designer Chi-Long Trieu Type Director Alexis Gargaloni Typographer Jake Richardson Motion Designer Ron Daniels Motion Designer Amber Scott-Worthington Project Manager Client team Hannah May Executive Producer Brett Itaya Creative Director Christy Silva Creative Director Oliver Thein Design Lead Aliza Grant Designer Mads Jakob Poulsen Designer Gui Schneider Product Designer Next
items.article_text_zh:
Threads  
一场由实时对话能量塑造的身份认同。Threads找到了自己的声音。

背景  
Meta在Threads的关键转折期找到了我们。该平台已超越了发布初期的定位，需要确立自己不仅仅是Instagram的延伸。虽然现有的字标大量借鉴了Instagram Sans，但它缺乏独立自信的辨识度。与此同时，公共对话正变得更快、更具参与性，并越来越多地被实时文化势头所塑造。我们的机会是创造一款能够体现这种即时性的字标，同时为Threads在产品、营销活动和未来品牌体系中提供可扩展的身份认同。

破局  
Brief要求设计一款独立的字标和字形，但真正的挑战在于如何用字体形式定义实时公共对话应有的感觉。Threads上的对话通过强调、反应和势头推进，而非精雕细琢的发布。战略上的破局点是“趋势凿刻”：一种受凿尖记号笔启发、以及强调当下重要事物行为的设计原则。方向性的切割和受控的对比度，将文化的即时性直接转化为标识字体的结构。

创造  
该身份标识是动态存在的，而非静态存在。凿刻风格的切割为字形带来了强调和方向感，在精准与人文笔触之间取得平衡。它既避免了生硬的棱角，也避开了肤浅的个性，反而创造出一种受控的、向前的能量，感觉即时且富有触感。最终的字标使Threads与Instagram区分开来，可在产品和文化层面进行扩展，同时在Meta生态系统中仍显得浑然天成。

成为  
该字标为一个更广泛的视觉系统奠定了基础，该系统建立在节奏、强调和文化运动之上。在产品中，它保持清晰和功能性。在营销活动和实时场景中，凿刻逻辑通过动态、排版和图形强调变得更加富有表现力。该系统旨在灵活适应体育、音乐和娱乐领域，同时保持一个可识别的核心，根植于即时性、参与性和当下正在发生的事情。

无可置疑的Threads  
Threads不再是一个中立的社交平台或Instagram的衍生品。该身份标识赋予了品牌一种与对话如何在文化中流动直接相关的视觉行为：快速、有方向且不断演变。当竞争对手依赖被动的极简主义或精雕细琢的企业中立性时，Threads则传递出积极参与当下正在发生之事的信号。“趋势凿刻”将文化势头转化为形式，创造出一款感觉即时、人性化且专为实时视角而打造的字标。

Fast Company  
Threads终于拥有了与其雄心相匹配的标识

Julien Queyrane 创意总监

items.article_text:
Tools the Vercel Product Design Team Actually Uses
This writeup will be out of date within weeks, but that’s ok. This is a snapshot in time kind of post. Design tools are changing fast in a world that has never felt more disrupt-able. For our latest team meeting, I hosted a design tooling Show and Tell, where product designers shared what tools they are actually using for design work.
My takeaways were:
- Even within our small team, everyone is using completely different tools right now.
- We have a wide range of AI usage, from early adopters who haven’t gone a day without using AI in 6 months to skeptics who still find it mostly useless in their creative endeavors.
- AI tools for design workflows are clunky and lagging behind relative to AI tooling for engineering workflows.
Here’s a deeper dive into a few specifics.
Make Claude and Codex do Pair Programming
Timo has been using Codex as his primary coding agent but created a skill for Claude to review Codex’s work. The skill file instructs Codex to share its plan with Claude and ask for feedback (i.e. Is this more complex than it needs to be? Is there duplication? Is the API actually well designed?). The file also instructs Codex not to blindly comply, but defend what it believes in, only updating the plan when both models agree.
You can try this without any custom tooling. Just ask your agent to share its plan with a second model and hash it out before coming back to you. If you want to use Timo’s skill, check it out [here](https://github.com/timolins/claude-review) or use npx skills add timolins/claude-review
to install.
To Achieve Flow State, You Need Concurrent Threads
It was easy to get into a flow state in traditional design tools. We spent hours of focus time going broad and deep with creative juices. But now, we send a prompt and sit there waiting for the agent to complete a series of tasks. Before we know it, we’re doomscrolling Slack.
A few people on the team have landed on ways to use parallel threads to get into a flow state. Tom will start a project in Conductor and open a few different tabs in that project for a variety of topics: maybe one is for UX flows, one is for state and data, and another is for miscellaneous small paper cut fixes. Not only does it increase your agents’ productivity in the same amount of time, it also keeps things organized so you don’t lose your mind managing 100 little robot armies at once.
Designing from Production
In the old world, design files were ahead of production. Teams worked hard to keep them in sync. Now, because implementation cost and time has dramatically dropped, design files are laughably stale and production has a million features that never even started on a canvas. That’s ok because our designers are coding too.
But it presents some challenges. Sometimes you need a canvas to play around with ideas before going back to code. We’ve found a few tools that are good at getting production styles back into a canvas: I’ve personally had success with the Paper browser extension that copies the structure and style of a page almost perfectly and brings it into the Paper design canvas. But I’m not really an expert in designing in Paper yet and having more native access to our design system seems like the logical next feature.
With production as the source of truth, Sam built this [custom chrome extension](https://github.com/sambernhardt/click-to-component-chrome-extension) as an alternative to React Dev Tools to jump to the file locations. Both technically work but the custom extension is a bit quicker for his workflow so he prefers that - keyboard shortcuts for the win.
We also use agents in Slack to change code and open PRs for us. Everything from v0 to Cursor to Claude get @ mentions all the time in our Slack channels to update the repo for anything that doesn’t require significant new componentry. You can skip adding things to the backlog. It’s just as easy to fix clear and obvious paper cuts with an agent right from the Slac
items.article_text_zh:
Vercel 产品设计团队实际使用的工具

这篇总结几周内就会过时，但这没关系。这是一篇记录当下时刻的文章。设计工具正在快速变化，世界从未像现在这样充满被颠覆的可能。在最近的一次团队会议上，我主持了一场设计工具展示会，产品设计师们分享了他们实际用于设计工作的工具。

我的收获是：
- 即使在我们这个小团队里，每个人现在使用的工具也完全不同。
- 我们对 AI 的使用程度差异很大，从连续 6 个月每天使用 AI 的早期采用者，到认为 AI 在创意工作中基本无用的怀疑论者。
- 用于设计工作流的 AI 工具相对笨拙且落后于用于工程工作流的 AI 工具。

以下是对一些具体工具的深入探讨。

**让 Claude 和 Codex 进行结对编程**

Timo 一直将 Codex 作为他的主要编码代理，但他为 Claude 创建了一个技能来审查 Codex 的工作。该技能文件指示 Codex 与 Claude 分享其计划并征求反馈（例如：这比需要的更复杂吗？有重复吗？API 设计得好吗？）。该文件还指示 Codex 不要盲目服从，而是要捍卫自己认为正确的内容，只有在两个模型达成一致时才更新计划。

你无需任何自定义工具即可尝试。只需让你的代理与第二个模型分享其计划，并在返回给你之前进行讨论。如果你想使用 Timo 的技能，请点击[此处](https://github.com/timolins/claude-review)查看，或使用 `npx skills add timolins/claude-review` 进行安装。

**要达到心流状态，你需要并发线程**

在传统设计工具中，很容易进入心流状态。我们花费数小时的专注时间，广泛而深入地发挥创意。但现在，我们发送一个提示，然后坐在那里等待代理完成一系列任务。不知不觉中，我们就在 Slack 上刷屏了。

团队中有几个人找到了使用并行线程进入心流状态的方法。Tom 会在 Conductor 中启动一个项目，并为该项目的不同主题打开几个不同的标签页：一个用于 UX 流程，一个用于状态和数据，另一个用于各种琐碎的小修补。这不仅能在相同时间内提高代理的生产力，还能保持组织有序，让你不会因为同时管理 100 个小机器人军队而抓狂。

**从生产环境进行设计**

在过去，设计文件领先于生产环境。团队努力保持它们同步。现在，由于实施成本和时间大幅下降，设计文件已经过时得可笑，而生产环境中有数百万个从未在画布上开始的功能。这没关系，因为我们的设计师也在编码。

但这带来了一些挑战。有时你需要一个画布来构思想法，然后再回到代码中。我们发现了一些工具可以很好地将生产样式带回画布：我个人成功使用了 Paper 浏览器扩展，它几乎完美地复制了页面的结构和样式，并将其带入 Paper 设计画布。但我还不是在 Paper 中设计的专家，能够更原生地访问我们的设计系统似乎是合乎逻辑的下一个功能。

以生产环境为唯一真实来源，Sam 构建了这个[自定义 Chrome 扩展](https://github.com/sambernhardt/click-to-component-chrome-extension)，作为 React Dev Tools 的替代品，用于跳转到文件位置。两者在技术上都能工作，但自定义扩展对于他的工作流程来说更快一些，所以他更喜欢它——快捷键胜出。

我们还在 Slack 中使用代理来更改代码并为我们打开 PR。从 v0 到 Cursor 再到 Claude，在我们的 Slack 频道中经常被 @ 提及，以更新仓库中任何不需要大量新组件的内容。你可以跳过将内容添加到待办事项列表。直接从 Slack 使用代理修复明显的小问题同样容易。

items.article_text:
[Obs.js](https://github.com/csswizardry/Obs.js) reads a handful of browser signals ([Navigator](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Navigator) and [Battery](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Battery_Status_API) APIs) to infer connection strength, battery status, and device capability. It exposes those signals as CSS classes on the element, and as properties on window.obs , so you can adapt delivery accordingly: serve lower-resolution media, forgo web fonts, disable auto-playing video… you name it. In fact, if you have critically low battery, data saver mode enabled, or a weak connection, you won’t see the nice rounded [Fredoka](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Fredoka) in the

above—you’ll just see your system-ui font: [Obs.js](https://github.com/csswizardry/Obs.js) is built and maintained by [Harry Roberts](https://csswizardry.com) under the MIT license. This page shows the .has-* classes that [Obs.js](https://github.com/csswizardry/Obs.js) adds to the element, and the current window.obs object where it stores device and network information. Try toggling Data Saver, plugging/unplugging power, or changing networks to see updates (where supported). html.classList window.obs Note: API support varies by browser; Chromium has the broadest coverage. Obs.js must be placed early in the as an inline

items.article_text:
Tailwind CSS v4.3 is here, and because apparently shipping v4.2 was easier than remembering to blog about it, this post is secretly about two releases worth of new stuff. Here's what landed in v4.2: [New](https://tailwindcss.com#new-mauve-olive-mist-and-taupe-palettes)— four more neutral-ish palettes for when gray, zinc, neutral, stone, and slate have somehow failed you.mauve ,olive ,mist , andtaupe palettes[First-class webpack plugin](https://tailwindcss.com#first-class-webpack-plugin)— for a huge performance boost in frameworks like Next.js.[More logical property utilities](https://tailwindcss.com#more-logical-property-utilities)— includingpbs-* ,mbs-* ,inline-* ,block-* , and new logical inset utilities.[New](https://tailwindcss.com#new-font-features-utility)— control low-level OpenType features without writing custom CSS every time.font-features-* utility …and here's what's new in v4.3: [New scrollbar utilities](https://tailwindcss.com#new-scrollbar-utilities)— style scrollbars without wondering which half-supported browser API you're supposed to use this week.[New](https://tailwindcss.com#new-container-size-utility)— create size containers for when your container queries need to care about height too.@container-size utility[New](https://tailwindcss.com#new-zoom-utilities)— use the CSSzoom-* utilitieszoom property directly in your markup, now that every browser has finally agreed it exists.[New](https://tailwindcss.com#new-tab-utilities)— control the rendered width of tab characters, just please don't make it eight like GitHub used to.tab-* utilities[Stacked + compound](https://tailwindcss.com#stacked-compound-variant-support)— use stacked and compound variants directly in CSS.@variant support[Default values for functional utilities](https://tailwindcss.com#default-values-for-functional-utilities)— define utilities that work with or without a value. A lot of the v4.2 improvements, including the new logical property utilities and font-features-* support, came out of collaborations with teams at Netflix and Vercel through our [Partners Program](https://tailwindcss.com/sponsor#partners). If there are framework improvements like this that would make Tailwind CSS work better for your team, we'd love to help. Upgrade your projects by installing the latest version of tailwindcss from npm: npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/cli@latest npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/vite@latest npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/postcss@latest npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/webpack@latest [New ](https://tailwindcss.com#new-mauve-olive-mist-and-taupe-palettes)mauve , olive , mist , and taupe palettes mauve , olive , mist , and taupe palettesIn v4.2 we added four new color palettes to the default theme: mauve , olive , mist , and taupe . These originally came out of [Oatmeal](https://tailwindcss.com/plus/changelog#2025-12-18), the multi-theme marketing site kit we released for Tailwind Plus back in December, where we needed a few more neutral-ish palettes that still felt distinct from the grays we already ship. They're all in that useful neutral-adjacent category where you want something that still behaves like gray, but has a little more personality: They're a nice substitute for the existing gray palettes when you want the whole design to lean a little warmer, cooler, greener, or… mauver?
Mauve
Olive
Mist and taupe
Check out the [colors documentation](https://tailwindcss.com/docs/colors) for a pretty grid of all the available colors. [First-class webpack plugin](https://tailwindcss.com#first-class-webpack-plugin) Tailwind CSS v4.2 added a dedicated @tailwindcss/webpack loader for integrating Tailwind CSS in webpack projects. Before this, webpack projects usually ran Tailwind through postcss-loader and @tailwindcss/postcss , which works, but m
items.article_text_zh:
Tailwind CSS v4.3 来了，而且由于发布 v4.2 显然比记得写博客要容易，这篇文章实际上悄悄包含了两个版本的新内容。 以下是 v4.2 中新增的功能： * [新增](https://tailwindcss.com#new-mauve-olive-mist-and-taupe-palettes)——四种更中性的调色板，适用于当 gray、zinc、neutral、stone 和 slate 都无法满足你需求的情况。`mauve`、`olive`、`mist` 和 `taupe` 调色板 * [一流的 webpack 插件](https://tailwindcss.com#first-class-webpack-plugin)——在 Next.js 等框架中实现巨大的性能提升。 * [更多逻辑属性工具](https://tailwindcss.com#more-logical-property-utilities)——包括 `pbs-*`、`mbs-*`、`inline-*`、`block-*` 以及新的逻辑 inset 工具。 * [新增 `font-features-*` 工具](https://tailwindcss.com#new-font-features-utility)——无需每次都编写自定义 CSS 即可控制底层 OpenType 特性。 ……以下是 v4.3 中的新内容： * [新增滚动条工具](https://tailwindcss.com#new-scrollbar-utilities)——无需纠结这周该用哪个半支持的浏览器 API 即可设置滚动条样式。 * [新增 `@container-size` 工具](https://tailwindcss.com#new-container-size-utility)——创建尺寸容器，让你的容器查询也能关心高度。 * [新增 `zoom-*` 工具](https://tailwindcss.com#new-zoom-utilities)——既然所有浏览器最终都同意 `zoom` 属性存在，现在可以直接在标记中使用 CSS `zoom` 属性。 * [新增 `tab-*` 工具](https://tailwindcss.com#new-tab-utilities)——控制 Tab 字符的渲染宽度，只是请别像 GitHub 以前那样设为八个空格。 * [堆叠 + 复合 `@variant` 支持](https://tailwindcss.com#stacked-compound-variant-support)——直接在 CSS 中使用堆叠和复合变体。 * [功能工具的默认值](https://tailwindcss.com#default-values-for-functional-utilities)——定义无论是否带值都能工作的工具。 v4.2 的许多改进，包括新的逻辑属性工具和 `font-features-*` 支持，都源于我们通过[合作伙伴计划](https://tailwindcss.com/sponsor#partners)与 Netflix 和 Vercel 团队的合作。如果有类似这样的框架改进能让 Tailwind CSS 更好地为你的团队服务，我们很乐意提供帮助。 通过从 npm 安装最新版本的 `tailwindcss` 来升级你的项目： ```bash npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/cli@latest npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/vite@latest npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/postcss@latest npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/webpack@latest ``` [新增 `mauve`、`olive`、`mist` 和 `taupe` 调色板](https://tailwindcss.com#new-mauve-olive-mist-and-taupe-palettes) 在 v4.2 中，我们为默认主题添加了四种新的调色板：`mauve`、`olive`、`mist` 和 `taupe`。 这些最初源自 [Oatmeal](https://tailwindcss.com/plus/changelog#2025-12-18)，这是我们在 12 月为 Tailwind Plus 发布的多主题营销网站套件，当时我们需要一些更中性的调色板，但仍感觉与我们已有的灰色有所区别。 它们都属于有用的中性邻近类别，适用于你想要一些仍然像灰色一样表现，但更具个性的场景： 当你希望整个设计稍微偏暖、偏冷、偏绿或……偏紫时，它们是现有灰色调色板的绝佳替代品。 ```html
Mauve
Olive
Mist and taupe
``` 查看[颜色文档](https://tailwindcss.com/docs/colors)，了解所有可用颜色的漂亮网格。 [一流的 webpack 插件](https://tailwindcss.com#first-class-webpack-plugin) Tailwind CSS v4.2 添加了一个专用的 `@tailwindcss/webpack` 加载器，用于在 webpack 项目中集成 Tailwind CSS。 在此之前，webpack 项目通常通过 `postcss-loader` 和 `@tailwindcss/postcss` 来运行 Tailwind，这虽然可行，但

items.article_text: Mac iPhone Blog Pricing About Download Bitrig Now Builds iPad Apps April 14, 2026 by Kyle Macomber There’s something irresistible about the iPad. It’s incredibly thin, light, and fast. A piece of glass that instantly transforms into whatever app you’re using. A bigger, blanker canvas than the iPhone. More direct and intimate than the Mac. It invites exploration and creativity. Today, we’re excited to share: Bitrig can now build native Swift iPad apps. You get access to the full iPadOS SDK, so you can build iPad apps with rich multi-column layouts, Apple Pencil support, multiple windows, and more. You can run your app on a connected iPad or in the Xcode iPad Simulator, so your previews reflect what your users get on TestFlight and the App Store. After all these years, it still feels like the iPad hasn’t fully realized its potential. Maybe the killer app for iPad hasn’t been built yet? Maybe you’ll build it. Product Mac iPhone Pricing Company Blog About Privacy Policy Terms of Service Contact Us
items.article_text_zh:
Mac  iPhone  博客  定价  关于  下载  

**Bitrig 现已支持构建 iPad 应用**  
2026年4月14日  Kyle Macomber  

iPad 有种难以抗拒的魅力。它极致轻薄、快速，是一块能瞬间化身为你所用应用的玻璃。相比 iPhone，它拥有更大、更空白的画布；相比 Mac，它更直接、更亲密。它激发探索与创造力。  

今天，我们激动地宣布：**Bitrig 现已支持构建原生 Swift iPad 应用**。你将获得完整的 iPadOS SDK 访问权限，从而构建具备丰富多列布局、Apple Pencil 支持、多窗口等特性的 iPad 应用。你可以在连接的 iPad 上或 Xcode iPad 模拟器中运行应用，确保预览效果与用户在 TestFlight 和 App Store 中获得的体验一致。  

这么多年过去，iPad 似乎仍未完全释放其潜力。也许 iPad 的杀手级应用尚未诞生？也许，它正等着你来创造。

items.article_text:
LUMIX L10 Premium Point & Shoot Digital Camera, 24-75mm Zoom Lens
The LUMIX L10 is designed for everyday inspiration. A bright Leica 24–75mm F1.7-2.8 zoom lens, large sensor, and Real Time LUT color tools help you create beautiful images straight out of camera that you can share on social instantly. A premium, everyday carry camera made for street, travel, and daily moments.
Features
- Premium compact design for everyday carry
- Bright Leica 24-75mm F1.7-2.8 zoom lens for creative range
- Expressive color creation with Real Time LUTs, film‑inspired styles, and AI looks
- 20.4MP CMOS sensor for rich detail, natural color, and strong low‑light performance
- AI tracking and image stabilization for sharp, blur-free shots
- OLED viewfinder and free‑angle screen for confident horizontal or vertical content capture
[LUMIX L10 Premium Point & Shoot Digital Camera, 24-75mm Zoom Lens](https://shop.panasonic.com/products/lumix-l10-premium-point-shoot-digital-camera-24-75mm-zoom-lens)
Shaping Emotions
Developed in Osaka, Japan, the LUMIX L10 is a premium compact camera made to feel instantly natural in your hands. Designed for effortless control and a truly enjoyable shooting experience, it lets your eyes stay on what matters most—the moment in front of you. Compact enough to go anywhere, with controls placed exactly where you expect them, the LUMIX L10 helps you focus on capturing the moment, not figuring out the camera.
Trusted Design. Beautiful Presence.
Designed as a dependable tool for passionate photographers, it combines the rich feel of metal with a saffiano-leather-textured exterior in an authentic design. This creates a presence that feels both modern and classic, and makes it a pleasure to carry.
[FIND OUT MORE](https://shop.panasonic.com/pages/lumix-l10-design-form-meets-function#trusted)
Master the Light
Precision-machined from solid metal, the lens barrel features a high quality finish. A front-positioned aperture ring lets you intuitively control the light entering the lens.
Compact Body, Full Creative Control
A compact form for everyday use with intuitive analog controls. Enjoy the tactile feel of the dials and rings, and compose through the viewfinder. It balances minimal design with responsive handling.
[FIND OUT MORE](https://shop.panasonic.com/pages/lumix-l10-design-form-meets-function#compact)
A Design Worth Celebrating
Since its debut in 2001, LUMIX has continued to evolve and now celebrates its 25th anniversary. To mark the occasion, Titanium Gold is introduced as a special-edition color option alongside the classic Black and Silver options.
[FIND OUT MORE](https://shop.panasonic.com/pages/lumix-l10-celebratory-titanium-gold-edition-development-story)
Capture the Subtle Expressions of Light with the LEICA DC Lens
Featuring a LEICA DC Lens
The LEICA DC VARIO-SUMMILUX 24-75mm* F1.7-2.8 lens renders rich depth, impressive bokeh, and delicate gradations of light and shadow.
*35mm camera equivalent.
･Leica is a registered trademark of Leica Microsystems IR GmbH.
Discover the World of Macro Photography
Get as close as 3cm (approx. 1.18in) to your subject at the wide end with AF Macro capability. Capture captivating details up close, from beautifully crafted objects to small flowers discovered on a walk.
LUMIX Color
LUMIX is built around the philosophy of “Capturing It All”—so you can capture the full strength, beauty, and emotion of every moment. At the heart of this is the Standard Photo Style, designed to deliver natural, true‑to‑life images with a refined balance of realistic color and pleasing tones. When you’re ready to explore, a wide range of Photo Styles lets you match the look to your scene or your creative mood, giving you more ways to express your vision. And following the popularity of L.ClassicNeo, two new film‑inspired Photo Styles have been introduced—bringing even more character and creative freedom to your photography.
L.Classic
With its soft, low-saturation palette and smooth tonal gradation, this filter
items.article_text_zh:
LUMIX L10 高级便携数码相机，24-75mm 变焦镜头
LUMIX L10 专为日常灵感而设计。明亮的徕卡 24-75mm F1.7-2.8 变焦镜头、大尺寸传感器和实时 LUT 色彩工具，助您直出精美影像，即刻分享至社交平台。这是一款专为街拍、旅行和日常瞬间打造的高级随身相机。

特点
- 高级紧凑设计，便于日常携带
- 明亮的徕卡 24-75mm F1.7-2.8 变焦镜头，提供创意拍摄范围
- 通过实时 LUT、胶片风格和 AI 外观实现富有表现力的色彩创作
- 20.4MP CMOS 传感器，呈现丰富细节、自然色彩和出色的弱光性能
- AI 追踪与图像稳定功能，确保画面清晰无抖动
- OLED 取景器和自由角度屏幕，自信拍摄横屏或竖屏内容

[LUMIX L10 高级便携数码相机，24-75mm 变焦镜头](https://shop.panasonic.com/products/lumix-l10-premium-point-shoot-digital-camera-24-75mm-zoom-lens)

塑造情感
LUMIX L10 在日本大阪研发，是一款高级紧凑型相机，上手即感自然。它设计旨在实现轻松操控和真正愉悦的拍摄体验，让您的目光始终专注于最重要的事——眼前的瞬间。机身小巧，可随身携带，控制按键布局恰到好处，LUMIX L10 助您专注于捕捉瞬间，而非琢磨相机操作。

值得信赖的设计。优雅的存在感。
作为摄影爱好者的可靠工具，它采用金属质感与萨菲亚诺皮革纹理外观相结合的真实设计，营造出既现代又经典的格调，让携带成为一种享受。

[了解更多](https://shop.panasonic.com/pages/lumix-l10-design-form-meets-function#trusted)

掌控光线
镜头筒由实心金属精密加工而成，表面处理品质出众。前置光圈环让您直观地控制进入镜头的光线。

紧凑机身，全面创意掌控
紧凑的机身设计便于日常使用，并配备直观的模拟控制。享受拨盘和环的触感，通过取景器构图。它在极简设计与灵敏操控之间取得了平衡。

[了解更多](https://shop.panasonic.com/pages/lumix-l10-design-form-meets-function#compact)

值得庆祝的设计
自 2001 年问世以来，LUMIX 不断演进，如今迎来 25 周年。为纪念这一时刻，除经典黑色和银色外，特别推出钛金色作为限量版配色。

[了解更多](https://shop.panasonic.com/pages/lumix-l10-celebratory-titanium-gold-edition-development-story)

以 LEICA DC 镜头捕捉光线的微妙表现
搭载 LEICA DC 镜头
LEICA DC VARIO-SUMMILUX 24-75mm* F1.7-2.8 镜头呈现丰富的景深、令人印象深刻的虚化效果以及细腻的光影渐变。
*相当于 35mm 相机。
･Leica 是 Leica Microsystems IR GmbH 的注册商标。

探索微距摄影世界
在广角端使用 AF 微距功能，可近至约 3cm（约 1.18 英寸）拍摄。从精美的手工艺品到散步时发现的小花，近距离捕捉迷人细节。

LUMIX 色彩
LUMIX 秉承“捕捉一切”的理念——让您捕捉每个瞬间的全部力量、美感与情感。其核心是标准照片风格，旨在呈现自然、真实的影像，在真实色彩与悦目色调之间实现精妙平衡。当您准备探索时，丰富的照片风格让您根据场景或创意心情匹配外观，为您提供更多表达视野的方式。继 L.ClassicNeo 大获成功后，又推出了两种全新胶片风格照片风格——为您的摄影带来更多个性与创作自由。

L.Classic
凭借其柔和、低饱和度的色调与平滑的色调渐变，这款滤镜

For support leaders Manage your team, your AI agents and your entire support experience in one beautifully designed system. Resources Ideas blog Product & Design thoughts from our leadership team AI research blog Insights from the Intercom AI group The Ticket podcast Conversations with future-focused leaders at the cutting edge of customer service. Our customers Help center Academy Events Community Guides & Reports Search Search for: Sign in View demo Start free trial Search for: Intercom Blog Product For customers Meet your customers where they already are with the world’s best business messenger for chat, email, voice, social… For support agents An AI-enhanced inbox to supercharge your team. For support leaders Manage your team, your AI agents and your entire support experience in one beautifully designed system. Resources Ideas blog Product & Design thoughts from our leadership team AI research blog Insights from the Intercom AI group The Ticket podcast Conversations with future-focused leaders at the cutting edge of customer service. Our customers Help center Academy Events Community Guides & Reports Sign in View demo Start free trial News & Updates Published May 12, 2026 Today Intercom becomes Fin We’re changing the name of our company to Fin. Intercom will live on as our customer service software platform, but Fin is our future. Eoghan McCabe 3 min Sometimes you see a corporate announcement that’s so obvious and so late, it’s almost an admission of failure. And I’m open to feedback on how I should have pulled the trigger on this change much sooner. But the tech industry is so littered with awkward and arguably unsuccessful name changes that I thought it prudent to procrastinate on this one. But finally, today, we’re changing the name of our company to Fin . The name Intercom will still live on as the name of our customer service software platform that increasingly the best brands are choosing as their primary help desk; we just launched a complete rebuild, Intercom 2 , and we’re dramatically increasing our investment in it. But the company behind it will be named after our leading customer agent platform, Fin. All of our 1,400 employees are now employed by Fin. You’re reading a post by the CEO of Fin. In this moment of great change, for our industry, and for all economic players, the winners of yesteryear have largely been left holding on to their former positions that brought them so much glory. Yet, as I’ve written before, the only path to success in the future is through destroying your past. We’ve done this with our culture, our pricing model, our product lineup, and our investment priorities. But the company name stayed the same. However, when we started the service agent category three years ago, we promoted our new technology with the name Fin, with Intercom very much in the background, and usually not even mentioned at all. The simple reason is that humans are very good at mapping meaning onto the world and then updating that map rarely, with a very strong bias for the things that are new and shiny. We couldn’t possibly wake up every morning questioning what a chair was and how it works. But when a new type of drone or artificially intelligent software product reaches our attention, we do our best to understand it and add it to the repertoire of things we understand about the world. This is true in all aspects of life, including with companies and their brand names and the positions they hold in the market. I believe this so thoroughly that I actually think that the relative success of the newcomers in our category, despite the fact that we have provably superior technology, is a result of the fact that they have no baggage. They don’t need to convince anyone of their new positi
items.article_text_zh: 跳到主内容 Intercom 博客 产品 面向客户 使用全球最佳商务信使（支持聊天、邮件、语音、社交等），在客户所在之处与他们相遇。 面向客服专员 一个AI增强的收件箱，为您的团队赋能。 面向客服主管 在一个设计精美的系统中管理您的团队、AI智能体和整个客服体验。 资源 创意博客 来自我们领导团队的产品与设计思考 AI研究博客 Intercom AI团队的见解 The Ticket播客 与面向未来的领导者就客户服务前沿进行对话。 我们的客户 帮助中心 学院 活动 社区 指南与报告 搜索 搜索： 登录 查看演示 免费试用 搜索： Intercom 博客 产品 面向客户 使用全球最佳商务信使（支持聊天、邮件、语音、社交等），在客户所在之处与他们相遇。 面向客服专员 一个AI增强的收件箱，为您的团队赋能。 面向客服主管 在一个设计精美的系统中管理您的团队、AI智能体和整个客服体验。 资源 创意博客 来自我们领导团队的产品与设计思考 AI研究博客 Intercom AI团队的见解 The Ticket播客 与面向未来的领导者就客户服务前沿进行对话。 我们的客户 帮助中心 学院 活动 社区 指南与报告 登录 查看演示 免费试用 新闻与更新 发布于2026年5月12日 今天，Intercom更名为Fin 我们将公司名称改为Fin。Intercom将继续作为我们的客户服务软件平台存在，但Fin是我们的未来。 Eoghan McCabe 3分钟 有时，你会看到一则企业公告，它如此显而易见却又姗姗来迟，几乎像是在承认失败。我接受关于我本应更早做出这一改变的反馈。但科技行业充斥着尴尬且可以说是不成功的更名案例，因此我认为谨慎拖延是明智之举。然而今天，我们终于将公司名称改为Fin。Intercom这个名字将继续作为我们客户服务软件平台的名称存在——越来越多的优秀品牌选择它作为主要帮助台；我们刚刚推出了完全重建的Intercom 2，并正在大幅增加对其的投资。但背后的公司将以我们领先的客户智能体平台Fin命名。我们所有的1400名员工现在都受雇于Fin。你正在阅读的是Fin CEO发表的文章。 在这个行业以及所有经济参与者都经历巨大变革的时刻，昔日的赢家大多紧紧抓住曾带给他们辉煌的旧有地位。然而，正如我之前所写，通往未来成功的唯一道路就是摧毁你的过去。我们在文化、定价模式、产品线和投资优先级上都做到了这一点。但公司名称一直没变。然而，三年前我们开创服务智能体类别时，我们用Fin这个名字推广新技术，而Intercom则退居幕后，通常甚至根本不提及。原因很简单：人类非常擅长将意义映射到世界上，然后很少更新这张地图，并且对新奇事物有强烈的偏好。我们不可能每天早上都质疑椅子是什么以及它如何工作。但当一种新型无人机或人工智能软件产品引起我们注意时，我们会尽力理解它，并将其添加到我们对世界的认知库中。这在生活的方方面面都是如此，包括公司及其品牌名称以及它们在市场中的地位。我对此深信不疑，以至于我认为，尽管我们拥有可证明的优越技术，但该类别中新进入者的相对成功，恰恰是因为他们没有历史包袱。他们无需说服任何人相信他们的新定位。
